lines.text: Pools at Disney's Polynesian Village Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Polynesian Village Resort and Disney's Polynesian Villas & Bungalows
MultipleWalt Disney World® Resortlocations

Paddle around the Lava Pool with its volcano, water slide and expansive deck; dip into the peaceful waters of the Oasis Pool; or relax in the zero entry Cove Pool—while the kids play in the Moana’s Voyage splash area.
All Ages
Lava Pool

Make a splash at this pool which features a towering volcano, a waterfall and a thrilling 142 foot-long waterslide. A zero-depth entry point, similar to a beach, slopes gently into the pool making for easy entry and exit. Nearby, a lounge and bar offer refreshments and snacks.
Cove Pool
Island Tower at Disney’s Polynesian Villas & Bungalows is home to this zero entry pool, offering relaxation for Guests staying at Disney’s Polynesian Village Resort.
Moana’s Voyage

Little ones can embrace their inner wayfinder at Island Tower at Disney’s Polynesian Villas & Bungalows with this whimsical, new splash area featuring life-size sculptures of Moana and her iconic canoe—inspired by Disney’s beloved movie Moana.
Oasis Pool
Nestled amid a lush garden, this all-ages leisure pool promises a more tranquil swim for those looking to relax and unwind.
Oasis Patio
Relax in your own private shaded area close to the pool—complete with cushioned lounge chairs, towels and more!

You can also place food and drink orders to be delivered from the Oasis Bar & Grill—featuring tasty favorites like fish tacos, kalua pork sliders and Polynesian-themed burgers, along with tropical cocktails, wine, Hawaiian beer and assorted beverages (separate dining charges apply).

Oasis Patios accommodate up to 6 Guests and are available for rent on a first-come, first-served basis. For advanced reservations and pricing information, call (407) WDW-PLAY [(407) 939-7529]. Guests under 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
Poolside Activities

Let’s make a splash at Lava Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Know Before You Go
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
